summary: FAB (Floating Action Button) feature testing complete. All tests PASSED across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports. FAB correctly consolidates WhatsApp, Call, and Book Consultation actions on mobile/tablet while being hidden on desktop where standalone WhatsApp button is displayed.

mobile_390x844.fab_visible: PASS - Sparkle button visible at bottom-right, above tab bar
mobile_390x844.fab_click_expands: PASS - Shows 3 actions: Book Consultation, Call Us, WhatsApp
mobile_390x844.fab_click_collapses: PASS - Second click closes expanded menu
mobile_390x844.whatsapp_standalone_hidden: PASS - Green WhatsApp button not visible (hidden lg:flex working)
mobile_390x844.aura_avatar_visible: PASS - Visible at bottom-[148px], above FAB
mobile_390x844.call_action_visible: PASS - Action ready to initiate call
mobile_390x844.whatsapp_action_visible: PASS - Action ready to open WhatsApp link

tablet_768x1024.fab_expands_with_actions: PASS - All 3 actions visible when expanded
tablet_768x1024.tab_bar_visible: PASS - Mobile tab bar visible at bottom

desktop_1920x800.fab_hidden: PASS - FAB not visible (lg:hidden working correctly)
desktop_1920x800.whatsapp_standalone_visible: PASS - Green WhatsApp button visible at bottom-right
desktop_1920x800.header_navigation_visible: PASS - Full desktop nav menu visible
desktop_1920x800.mobile_tab_bar_hidden: PASS - Tab bar hidden on desktop

MobileQuickActions.tsx.line_76: lg:hidden class correctly hides FAB on desktop (>= 1024px)
bottom-[84px] positions FAB above mobile tab bar
MobileQuickActions.tsx.data_testids: All required test IDs present: quick-actions-fab, quick-action-consultation, quick-action-call, quick-action-whatsapp

WhatsAppEnhanced.tsx.line_278: 'hidden lg:flex' correctly hides standalone WhatsApp on mobile/tablet

AIChatWidget.tsx.line_116: bottom-[148px] lg:bottom-[104px] positions AURA above FAB on mobile and above WhatsApp on desktop

ClientLayout.tsx.line_73: MobileQuickActions integrated with onBookConsultation callback to open ConsultationFormLazy

context_for_next_testing_agent: FAB feature fully implemented and tested. Key classes: MobileQuickActions uses 'lg:hidden' so only visible on mobile/tablet (< 1024px). WhatsAppEnhanced uses 'hidden lg:flex' for opposite behavior (desktop only). AURA avatar uses responsive positioning bottom-[148px] lg:bottom-[104px] to sit above FAB on mobile and above WhatsApp on desktop. Book Consultation action opens ConsultationFormLazy modal.
